pi_items.source: Task description instructions and verifier.py logic explicitly enforce this exact dashboard name.
Task description instructions and verifier.py regex and string checks explicitly require these exact titles.
Task description instructions and verifier.py regex check for 95 parameter within percentileOfSeries function calls.
Task description explicitly assigns the user the role of Platform Engineer.
Domain context established by task description regarding EC2 instances, capacity planning, and cloud metrics.
Output path generated by export_result.sh and consumed by verifier.py RESULT_PATH constant.

privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task operates on real Numenta Anomaly Benchmark (NAB) EC2 CPU metric data seeded into a local Graphite backend. Validated that the explicit expected_dashboard_name 'Capacity Planning Q4', expected_graph_titles ['P95 CPU Utilization', 'CPU Variability'], and expected_percentile 95 perfectly align with both the task prompt instructions and the evaluation constraints within the local verifier logic.
